FIXTURE SCRIPT

                    Written by Nobody

INT. WAREHOUSE - NIGHT

     A bare bulb swings. TWO GOONS drag a chair across concrete.
     The DETECTIVE waits, coat still dripping.

                         DETECTIVE
                    Where were you on the night of
                    the fourteenth?

                         SUSPECT
               (lighting a cigarette)
                    You already know the answer.
                    That's why you're sweating.

     The Detective slams the file on the table. Papers scatter.

CUT TO:

EXT. ROOFTOP - DAWN

                         DETECTIVE (V.O.)
                    Everyone talks. Eventually.
